responses: Hello! Welcome to College Assistant. How can I help you today?
Hi there! Ask me anything about our college.
Admissions open in May each year. Last date is July 31st. Apply online at our college website.
You need 50% minimum in 12th grade. The application fee is 500.
We offer B.Tech (CS, IT, ECE, Mechanical), BCA, MCA, BBA, MBA, and B.Sc programs.
Popular courses: B.Tech CSE (120 seats), BCA (60 seats), MBA (60 seats).
B.Tech fee: 85,000 per year. BCA: 55,000 per year. MBA: 1,20,000 per year. Hostel: 45,000 per year.
Scholarships available for merit students. Fee waiver from 10% to 25%.
Odd semester runs July to November. Even semester runs December to April. Exams in May and December.
Diwali break in October or November. Winter break from Dec 25 to Jan 1. Summer break from May to June.
We have a digital library open from 8 AM to 10 PM, 3 canteens, sports complex, and separate boys and girls hostels.
WiFi campus, smart classrooms, and 24/7 medical room available.
Average placement is 4.5 LPA. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Amazon, Wipro, Accenture.
90 percent of eligible students got placed last year. Highest package was 24 LPA from Amazon.
Campus address: College Road, Civil Lines, Delhi-110054
You are welcome! Come back if you have more questions.
Happy to help! Good luck with your college journey.
